title: Dark Light Box
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"eo5go","text":"45 x 20 x 20cm custom box divided into 1/3 dark (covered with lid, \u003c5lux) and 2/3 white (~100lux)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d0pn7","text":"video recording set up","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3ml5u","text":"cleaning solution","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Set up the dark light box. See materials.
Place each mouse into the dark compartment before closing the lid and left to explore for 6minutes.
Manually score for each animal the time in the light box as well as the number of times the mouse entered the light box.
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
